name: opengrid
description: OpenGrid Nigeria — an open directory and API for all public facilities across Nigeria

scripts.deploy: $npm_execpath run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name opengrid --branch main
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute opengrid --local --file=migrations/0001_create_tables.sql && wrangler d1 execute opengrid --local --file=migrations/0002_add_facilities.sql
